2605.18610.title: CATA: Continual Machine Unlearning via Conflict-Averse Task Arithmetic
2605.18610.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable ability in aligning visual and textual representations, enabling a wide range of multimodal applications. However, their large-scale training data inevitably raises concerns about privacy, copyright, and undesirable content, creating a strong need for machine unlearning. While existing studies mainly focus on single-shot unlearning, practical VLM deployment often involves sequential removal requests over time, giving rise to continual machine unlearning. In this work, we make the first attempt to study continual unlearning for VLMs and identify three key challenges in this setting: effectiveness in removing target knowledge, fidelity in preserving retained model utility, and persistence in preventing knowledge re-emergence under sequential updates. To address these challenges, we propose CATA, a conflict-averse task arithmetic method that represents each forget request as an unlearning task vector. By maintaining historical task vectors and performing sign-aware conflict-averse aggregation, CATA suppresses conflicting update components that may weaken previous forgetting effects. Extensive experiments under both single-shot and continual settings show that CATA outperforms baselines in terms of forgetting effectiveness, model fidelity, and forgetting persistence.
2605.18610.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型 (VLMs) 在對齊視覺和文本表示方面展現了卓越的能力，使得各種多模態應用成為可能。<lb/>然而，它們的大規模訓練數據不可避免地引發了對隱私、版權和不當內容的擔憂，從而強烈需要機器的遺忘。<lb/>雖然現有研究主要集中於單次遺忘，但實際的 VLM 部署往往涉及隨時間進行的連續移除請求，這產生了持續的機器遺忘。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們首次嘗試研究 VLM 的持續遺忘，並在這一背景下確定了三個主要挑戰：有效移除目標知識的能力、保持保留模型效用的忠實度，以及在連續更新下防止知識重新出現的持久性。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 CATA，一種抗衝突的任務算術方法，將每個遺忘請求表示為一個遺忘任務向量。<lb/>通過維護歷史任務向量並進行符號感知的抗衝突聚合，CATA 抑制可能削弱先前遺忘效果的衝突更新組件。<lb/>在單次和持續設置下的廣泛實驗顯示，CATA 在遺忘有效性、模型忠實度和遺忘持久性方面均優於基準。
2605.18610.author: Shen Lin et.al.
2605.18610.authors: Shen Lin, Junhao Dong, Rongjie Chen, Xiaoyu Zhang, Li Xu, Xiaofeng Chen
